name: gemini.models.generate_content
description: Gemini (Google `google-genai` / `@google/genai`) plain turn. Input has a flat `contents` list of Content objects with `role` + `parts[]`. Output is a `GenerateContentResponse` with `candidates[].content.parts[]` (the assistant's reply) plus `usage_metadata` (snake_case in Python, `usageMetadata` in TS — fixture pins the Python shape; renderer + tokensFromUsage accept both).

parts.text: What's the capital of Japan? One word.
